description: Project-local Single Source of Truth for co-game invariants (model registry, i18n locales, root allowlist). Kept independent of the ai_workspace monorepo so co-game validates correctly whether nested or checked out standalone. Read by scripts/validate-model-registry.ts, scripts/validate-md-language.ts, and scripts/audit.ts.

i18n.description: Internationalization policy. locale_codes defines all language codes recognized as valid translation zones. Files inside <lang-code>/ or locales/<lang-code>/ directories are exempt from the English-only documentation rule.

rootAllowlist.description: Whitelist of files and directories permitted in the co-game project root. Anything not in these lists triggers a stray-artifact audit failure.
